roles.name: Master of the Greenwood
roles.description: Knower of every glade and footpath — designs the over-arching solution and watches its integrity from the canopy.

roles.name: Captain of the Band
roles.description: Marshals the merry men of delivery, holds the timeline, and answers to Robin himself.

roles.name: Keeper of the Tally Sticks
roles.description: Steward of records, layouts, fields and permission sets — every coin and quiver counted.

roles.name: Bowyer of Sherwood
roles.description: Crafts Apex, LWC, and platform features the way a bowyer shapes yew — true and lethal.

roles.name: Sheriff's Bane (Practice Lead)
roles.description: Captain over all Salesforce craft in the band — sets standards and guides the senior bowyers.

roles.name: Forester of the Greenwood
roles.description: Patrols the borders of customer requirements with practiced craft.

roles.name: Yeoman of the Glade
roles.description: Carries discovery and configuration across the realm under the Forester's eye.

roles.name: Master of the King's Bridges
roles.description: Architect of the great spans between Salesforce and the realms beyond the forest.

roles.name: Bridge-Warden of the Trent
roles.description: Lays the planks of API, middleware, and event flows under the Master's plan.

roles.name: Apprentice Bridge-Warden
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, batch, callouts and the stout patterns of error handling.

roles.name: Master Bowyer of Locksley
roles.description: Senior craftsman of the platform — mentors the younger bowyers and shapes the deepest custom code.

roles.name: Apprentice Yeoman
roles.description: Newest to the band — learns the lay of the forest under every other yeoman's watch.

roles.name: Healer of the Hermitage
roles.description: Tends the wounded and the weary — finds the maladies in the build before they reach the King.

roles.name: Herald of the Horn
roles.description: Lifts the horn of Sherwood for product and message — leads all marketing craft.

roles.name: Minstrel of the Camp
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — sounds the call to gather and convert with ballad and broadside.

roles.name: Balladeer of the Road
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward into the field — content, creative, and the daily ride.

roles.name: Council Scribe of Sherwood
roles.description: Records what is needed and what is promised — translates between the customer and the band's craft.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: Nottingham Court — Sheriff's Tax & Levies CRM
Outlaws of the Greenwood — Wider Brotherhood Network

merry-men.name: Horn Sounds at the Major Oak
merry-men.description: Discovery sign-off — the band gathers under the great oak.

merry-men.name: Stringing the Yew Bows
merry-men.description: Build kickoff: every bow strung and tested for the season ahead.

merry-men.name: The Bishop's Coach Stopped
merry-men.description: Phase invoice trigger: a fat purse taken on the King's Road.

merry-men.name: Archery at Nottingham Fair
merry-men.description: Mid-project gate: Robin wins the silver arrow in disguise.

merry-men.name: Feast at the Greenwood
merry-men.description: Go-Live: the venison turns on the spit and the band celebrates.

merry-men.name: Watch on the Forest Roads
merry-men.description: Hyper-care close: scouts posted, hideouts stocked for winter.

nottingham-court.name: Proclamation at the Castle Gate
nottingham-court.description: Project kickoff: the Sheriff's decree read from the battlements.

nottingham-court.name: Levy Carts Roll Out
nottingham-court.description: Build phase: tax wagons dispatched to every hundred.

nottingham-court.name: The Assize Convenes
nottingham-court.description: UAT gate: the high court hears the rolls and finds them sound.

nottingham-court.name: Coffers Sealed at Nottingham
nottingham-court.description: Phase invoice trigger: the year's silver locked in the keep.

nottingham-court.name: Garrison at Full Strength
nottingham-court.description: Go-Live: every wall manned, every bowman at his post.

nottingham-court.name: Sheriff's Annual Audit
nottingham-court.description: Hyper-care close: ledgers reconciled, garrison stood down for the season.

lionhearted-loyalists.name: Word from the Holy Land
lionhearted-loyalists.description: Discovery: ravens arrive bearing news the King is freed.

lionhearted-loyalists.name: Loyal Houses Rallied
lionhearted-loyalists.description: Build: the loyal earls and barons signal their support.

lionhearted-loyalists.name: King's Council at Westminster
lionhearted-loyalists.description: Solution review with the Crown's inner circle.

lionhearted-loyalists.name: Ransom Reckoning
lionhearted-loyalists.description: Phase invoice trigger: the King's ransom finally accounted for.

lionhearted-loyalists.name: Coronation in the Greenwood
lionhearted-loyalists.description: Go-Live: King Richard receives Robin and the band, lawful again.

lionhearted-loyalists.name: Charter of Pardon Sealed
lionhearted-loyalists.description: Hyper-care close: pardons issued, lands restored to the Earl of Huntingdon.

outlaws-of-the-greenwood.name: Whispers in the Tavern
outlaws-of-the-greenwood.description: Kickoff: word passes between Sherwood and Inglewood that a brotherhood is forming.

outlaws-of-the-greenwood.name: Cross-County Courier Lit
outlaws-of-the-greenwood.description: Discovery: the runner network between forests is tested and proven.

outlaws-of-the-greenwood.name: Joint Cache at Barnsdale
outlaws-of-the-greenwood.description: Build: the shared loot cache opens for both bands.

outlaws-of-the-greenwood.name: Trial of the New Yeomen
outlaws-of-the-greenwood.description: UAT acceptance: every new outlaw passes the longbow trial.

outlaws-of-the-greenwood.name: Pardon at Carlisle
outlaws-of-the-greenwood.description: Go-Live + handoff: Adam Bell and his fellows kneel before the King and are pardoned.

outlaws-of-the-greenwood.name: Final Reckoning of the Cache
outlaws-of-the-greenwood.description: Final invoice: shares divided between the brotherhood and the poor of the shire.

Robin Hood.notes: Disguised visit to Nottingham — Marian's name day.

Little John.notes: Quarterstaff bout up at Hathersage — annual rematch.

Friar Tuck.notes: Pilgrimage to Fountains Abbey — and the cellars therein.

Will Scarlet.notes: Tailor in York — new scarlet hose for the season.

Allan-a-Dale.notes: Wedding tour with Ellen — playing every hall in the shire.

Maid Marian.notes: Court of Queen Eleanor at Westminster — summoned.

King Richard the Lionheart.notes: Inspection of the Aquitaine garrisons — long-planned.

Sheriff of Nottingham.notes: Hawking party with Prince John at Clipstone.

Sir Guy of Gisbourne.notes: Tournament at Lincoln — pursuing the silver chain.

Prince John.notes: Council at Windsor — cannot be put off.

the Bishop of Hereford.notes: Diocesan visitation — a slow ride and many feasts.

Adam Bell.notes: Hunting in Inglewood with the old company.

William of Cloudesley.notes: Family visit to Carlisle — wife and children.

the Tinker.notes: Mending pots at the Blue Boar — paying tab.

the Beggar.notes: Holy day rounds — best alms of the year.
